primary_focus: Bluetooth (Classic, LE, Mesh, LE Audio, Channel Sounding, HDT) and IEEE 802.15.4 (Thread, Matter, Zigbee multiprotocol) on Infineon AIROC chipsets
tone: concrete, technical, marketing-savvy; cite real chips, customers, standards, and dates
must_avoid: drifting to LE Audio when the topic is XR/AR/VR
boilerplate that does not reference the actual topic
discussing Infineon's own products when the user explicitly asks about competitors
